tweets.text: 🚀 Excited to announce a new feature in Commit Content Creator! I've added a /generate command to the Telegram bot for manual content generation. Now you can trigger content creation on-demand for your commits! #DevTools #Automation

🔍 How it works: Use /generate in your Telegram chat, and the bot will analyze a specific commit (or the latest) and craft engaging content for X. Perfect for sharing updates without waiting for automated triggers! 🛠️

💡 Why this matters: Manual control means more flexibility for devs. Want to highlight a specific change? Just trigger it! Curious how this can streamline your workflow? Drop your thoughts below! #AI #CommitContentTracker #GitHub #TypeScript
